# Test fixtures

Filesystem fixtures for scanner and integration tests will be created in later tasks.

Planned cases (see project scope Section 12):

- Empty directory
- Nested directories
- Large files
- Multiple extensions
- `node_modules`, `.next`, `.turbo`, `.nuget/packages`
- .NET `bin` and `obj`
- Symlink/junction (where supported)
- Permission/access errors (where practical)
